notes: Operator spot-checked the production dashboard: 288 leads render, build_label SOURCE_LIMITED banner displays the rolling-window framing, Boerne records correctly flagged potential_cross_county_leak with REVIEW_REQUIRED status, expected_sale_date column shows first Tuesday of recording month (e.g. 2026-06-02 for June 2026), evidence chain traces back to the original ArcGIS query URL with source_reliability_grade A and parser_confidence 100. Two-Truths invariant passes. Phase 1 synthetic harness still green (110/110). Phase 2 adapter test still green (9/9).
phase_4_scope_directive: Wire BCAD parcel-master via scrapers/parcel_master.py + scaffold/pipeline/matcher.py. Replace 288 placeholders with real BCAD data. Attributes (absentee, long_term_owned, high_equity, senior_owner, out_of_state, entity_owned) should fire and additional deal paths (sub_to, flip, messy_title) should unlock. Access pattern: prefer Harris Govern at https://hgo.harrisgovern.com/bexar/property/search; fall back to whatever works. Log recon observations in operator_notes.md.
